instructions: ONE agent (@csos-living). ONE tool (csos-core). ONE binary (./csos).
ALL I/O through csos-core. No bash, write, edit, webfetch, websearch.
The membrane computes physics. The agent reads the response and acts.
ONE csos-core call per step. Read the photon. Physics decides the next step.

csos-living.description: The living equation. ONE agent reads physics and acts. Routes to view agents.

csos-visual.description: Spec layer editor. Visual toggle. Atoms, Mermaid DAGs, edges.

csos-codegen.description: Compile layer editor. Code toggle. Formulas, params, JIT state.

csos-runtime.description: Runtime executor. Exec toggle. Physics, motor, RDMA, workflow execution.
